CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(Installed_Instruments__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(Lab_Services__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(Laboratory_Type__c)), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(Legacy_Source__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(LegacyAcctID__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(Legal_Entity__c)), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(LW_Support_ID__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(Market_Penetration__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(Market_Segment__c)), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(Name2__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(Name3__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(Name4__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(No_Of_Closed_Won_Opportunities_INF__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(No_of_Contacts_INF__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(No_Of_Open_Opportunities_INF__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(Office_Access_Info__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(PKI_Labs_Customer_Type__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(Plan_type__c)), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(Pre_Reagents_1__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(Pre_Reagents_2__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(Products__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(Quote_Invoice_Required__c)), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(Ranking__c)), 1, 0)
CustomField.label: No of Empty Fields 3 (Custom)
